query:
WITH entities AS (
                            SELECT e.created_at, e.id
                            FROM cala_entries e
                            JOIN cala_account_set_member_accounts m
                              ON m.member_account_id = e.account_id
                            LEFT JOIN cala_account_sets s
                              ON s.id = m.member_account_id
                            WHERE m.account_set_id = $4
                              AND s.id IS NULL
                              AND (COALESCE((e.created_at, e.id) < ($3, $2), $2 IS NULL))
                            ORDER BY e.created_at DESC, e.id DESC
                            LIMIT $1) SELECT i.id AS "entity_id: Repo__Id", e.sequence, e.event, CASE WHEN $5 THEN e.context ELSE NULL::jsonb END as "context: es_entity::ContextData", e.recorded_at FROM entities i JOIN cala_entry_events e ON i.id = e.id ORDER BY i.created_at desc, i.id desc, i.id, e.sequence
